fields.Name: Realtime: Advanced Bridge Controls
fields.Description: Gates who can start and manage realtime bridge sessions — joining external meetings (Zoom/Teams/Meet/Webex/Slack/Discord/LiveKit) or placing/receiving phone calls (Twilio/Vonage/RingCentral) on the organization's behalf. Acting as the org inside a third-party meeting or on its phone lines is privileged, so bridge session start/management requires this authorization separately from ordinary realtime session use.
